title: Overflow & scrolling
description: Contain content, hide overflow, or make it scrollable.

options: Clips content that exceeds the box
questions.explanation: The overflowing bits are visually hidden — but still in the DOM.

options: auto only shows scrollbars when needed; scroll always shows them
questions.explanation: auto = conditional scrollbars. scroll = always visible.

options: clip is like hidden but does NOT create a scroll container / painting context
questions.explanation: Use overflow-clip when you just want to visually cut without side effects.

options: Scroll chaining to the parent (rubber-banding to page)
questions.explanation: Great for modal bodies so scroll doesn't leak to the page.

options: Smoothly animates anchor jumps and JS scrolls
questions.explanation: Cheap way to make anchor links feel modern.
Add scroll-snap-align: start to each child for carousels.
